name: Signal Access CAPL Functions
title: Signal Access CAPL Functions
description: Signal Access in CAPL | Test Feature Set: Signal Oriented Access
tables: Gets the value of a signal.
Retrieves the description for the value of a database signal.
Gets the time point relative to the measurement start at which the signal was last sent on the bus.
Retrieves the value for a value description of a database signal.
Registers the given callback as a 'signal driver' for the signal.
Sets the transmitted signal to the accompanying value.
Checks the value of a signal, a system variable or an environment variable against a condition.
Checks a given value against the value of the signal, the system variable or the environment variable.
Reads the value of a byte array signal, treating it as an integer.
Writes the value of a byte array signal, treating it as a integer.
